questions.query_text: In the istio/istio releases, which release provides artifacts and release notes for the stable 1.29.0 version?

answer_support.answer_text: In the istio/istio release 1.29.0, the project provides artifacts and release notes for this stable release.

questions.query_text: Across the istio/istio releases, how does the content of release 1.28.1 differ from release 1.28.2?

options.text: 1.28.1 provides artifacts and release notes for its patch version, while 1.28.2 provides artifacts and release notes for its own patch version.
1.28.1 is a pre-release, while 1.28.2 is a stable release.
1.28.1 includes only artifacts, while 1.28.2 includes only release notes.
1.28.1 is a beta release, while 1.28.2 is an alpha release.

questions.expected_answer: 1.28.1 provides artifacts and release notes for its patch version, while 1.28.2 provides artifacts and release notes for its own patch version.

answer_support.answer_text: In the istio/istio release 1.28.1, the project provides artifacts and release notes for this patch version.
In the istio/istio release 1.28.2, the project provides artifacts and release notes for this patch version.

questions.query_text: In the istio/istio release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that provides artifacts and release notes for the 1.28.1 patch version, (2) a release that provides artifacts for the 1.29.0-alpha.0 pre-release, (3) a release that provides artifacts and release notes for the 1.29.0 stable release.

answer_support.answer_text: In the istio/istio release 1.28.1, the project provides artifacts and release notes for this patch version.
In the istio/istio release 1.29.0-alpha.0, the project provides artifacts for this alpha pre-release.
In the istio/istio release 1.29.0, the project provides artifacts and release notes for this stable release.
